theme: Kids football team yearbook — paper-cut layered cardboard, cream paper sky, green felt pitch, blue/yellow club colors
notes: Assets marked 'placeholder' are copies of kids_fantasy assets and must be replaced with sports-themed art. Assets marked 'draft' were generated with gpt-image-2 and may need refinement.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — left floater (pennant flag)
assets.description: Triangular pennant flag in blue/yellow club colors on a wooden stick, papercut style, floating left side of sky. Animation: sway 7000ms
Gold trophy cup with blue/yellow ribbon, papercut style, glowing right side of sky. Animation: bob 6000ms

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — left drifting cloud
assets.description: Layered paper cloud, soft cream tones, left side. Animation: drift
assets.replaceWith: Same layered cloud shape; optionally tint very slightly blue to match club palette

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — right drifting cloud
assets.description: Layered paper cloud, soft cream tones, right side. Animation: drift
assets.replaceWith: Same layered cloud shape; optionally tint very slightly blue to match club palette

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — center twinkle accents
assets.description: Cluster of gold stars, scattered across sky center. Animation: twinkle
assets.replaceWith: Gold stars + small football/star-burst accents instead of crescent moon

assets.description: Green felt football pitch with white line markings, hedge hills in background, floodlight structure left, bunting/pennants strung across, paper trees at sides
assets.replaceWith: Full-bleed pitch panorama. Keep the same horizon height as kids_fantasy background so scene layers line up.

assets.description: Cream-colored clubhouse building with blue roof, 'CLUBE' sign above entrance, wooden bench outside — papercut layered cardboard style. No idle animation.
assets.replaceWith: Replace dragon with clubhouse. Keep similar visual mass so scene balance is preserved.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero scene — priority LCP layer, centered anchor (boy with team book)
assets.description: Smiling boy (~10y) in blue/yellow striped football kit holding up the team yearbook 'A Nossa Equipa' — MUST read as a real person holding a real book. No enter animation, priority true. Parallax -8.
assets.replaceWith: This is the LCP and the brand centrepiece. Real person feel is essential — not cartoonish. Boy must clearly be holding a physical book, title visible.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero scene — left scene prop (football goal)
assets.description: White football goal with net and a football resting in the corner — papercut layered cardboard style.
assets.replaceWith: Replace boat with goal. Keep similar visual mass.

assets.description: Green pitch-edge band with grass tufts; footballs, and optionally a volleyball, rugby ball, and basketball scattered naturally along the edge to hint at multi-sport yearbook.
assets.replaceWith: Replace rolling flower hills with a pitch-edge grass strip. Sports balls can be baked in as papercut props.

assets.usage: FeatureCard col 1 icon — personalized team stories
assets.description: Open blue book with a gold star above it — papercut style, sports context
assets.replaceWith: Can reuse kids_fantasy book icon or swap for an open book with a team badge

assets.usage: FeatureCard col 2 icon — meaningful keepsake for families
assets.description: Gold medal hanging from a blue/yellow striped ribbon — papercut style
assets.replaceWith: Replace heart with a gold medal on club-colored ribbon

assets.description: Small trophy held up by two paper figure hands — papercut style
assets.replaceWith: Replace gift box with a trophy or rosette appropriate for end-of-season celebration
